# Lua Nil Review

Use this repository as the source for a persisted Lua nil-risk review skill on CodeAgent.

## Fast Workflow

1. If this skill is linked or installed at workspace scope, prefer `python .codeagent/skills/lua-nil-review/scripts/run_review_cycle.py refresh`.
2. Claim exactly one shard with the same wrapper path: `.../run_review_cycle.py claim`.
3. Review only the shard payload and snippet files. Do not free-read the full repository or giant Lua files unless the finding needs source escalation.
4. Complete and merge with the same wrapper path: `.../run_review_cycle.py complete --review-json <review.json>`.

## Notes

- For real use on another repository, prefer `codeagent skills link <repo> --scope workspace` or `codeagent skills install <repo> --scope workspace`, then call the installed wrapper from `.codeagent/skills/lua-nil-review/scripts/`.
- Start with `references/codeagent_getting_started.md` if you are new and want a step-by-step setup guide.
- Read `references/architecture.md` for visual diagrams of the runtime layers, persisted artifacts, and adapter surfaces.
- `CODEAGENT.md` is the only generated adapter document shipped by this alias build.

## Review JSON Example

```json
{
  "shard_id": "abc123",
  "reviewer": "codeagent",
  "summary": "One high-confidence nil issue remains.",
  "finding_reviews": [
    {
      "finding_id": "finding-id",
      "decision": "confirm",
      "rationale": "The local variable is assigned nil and reaches string.find without a guard.",
      "severity": "medium"
    }
  ]
}
```
